mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(O.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO) AS PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, O.EMPID, O.PERSON_ID, O.DEPTNO, O.INCLUDE_TYPE, O.CREATE_TYPE, O.ACTIVITY, O.WAGE_TYPE, TO_CHAR(O.CREATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, O.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(O.UPDATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, O.UPDATED_BY, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, HD.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, E.EMP_OFFICE FROM PA_PAY_OBJECT O LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON O.EMPID = E.EMPID AND E.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT HD ON E.DEPTNO = HD.DEPTNO
ORDER BY O.CREATE_DATE DESC, O.EMPID
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PA_PAY_OBJECT O LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON O.EMPID = E.EMPID AND E.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT HD ON E.DEPTNO = HD.DEPTNO

SELECT PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, EMPID, PERSON_ID, DEPTNO, INCLUDE_TYPE, CREATE_TYPE, ACTIVITY, WAGE_TYPE, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, EMP_NAME, DEPT_NAME, EMP_OFFICE FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(O.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO) AS PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, O.EMPID, O.PERSON_ID, O.DEPTNO, O.INCLUDE_TYPE, O.CREATE_TYPE, O.ACTIVITY, O.WAGE_TYPE, TO_CHAR(O.CREATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, O.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(O.UPDATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, O.UPDATED_BY, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, HD.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, E.EMP_OFFICE FROM PA_PAY_OBJECT O LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON O.EMPID = E.EMPID AND E.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT HD ON E.DEPTNO = HD.DEPTNO
ORDER BY O.CREATE_DATE DESC, O.EMPID ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, HD.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, E.EMP_OFFICE FROM HR_EMPLOYEE E LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT HD ON E.DEPTNO = HD.DEPTNO WHERE E.EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.ACTIVITY = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_PAY_OBJECT ( PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, EMPID, PERSON_ID, DEPTNO, INCLUDE_TYPE, CREATE_TYPE, ACTIVITY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) SELECT #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, E.EMPID, E.PERSON_ID, E.DEPTNO, #{includeType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1, 1, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE FROM HR_EMPLOYEE E WHERE E.EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_PAY_OBJECT SET INCLUDE_TYPE = #{includeType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE PA_PAY_OBJECT SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
